description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hashicorp/packer:1.4.2 Docker image with a custom entrypoint ( /usr/bin/env and PATH set ), and defines the stages validate, build, test, and deploy. Add a validate job in the validate stage that runs the exact command 'packer validate tests/packer.json'. Add a build job in the build stage that sets the variable PACKER_LOG=1, then executes 'cat /proc/cpuinfo', 'apk add --update qemu-system-x86_64 qemu-img', and 'packer build -timestamp-ui tests/packer.json', and always publishes any *.log files under /builds/${CI_PROJECT_PATH} as artifacts. No caches, rules, or deployment targets are configured.
